detaileddescription.para: For a given vector $ x $ , compute $|Vert x |Vert_{\infty} = \sup_n |x_n| $.

parameterdescription.para: The given vector.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

briefdescription.para: Compute the infinity norm of a vector on an orthonormal coordinate system.

detaileddescription.para: For a given vector $ x $ , compute $|Vert x |Vert_{\infty} = \sup_n |x_n| $.

parameterdescription.para: The given vector.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

detaileddescription.para: In case of scalar, the infinity norm returns the scalar.

parameterdescription.para: The given double.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, ConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > function)
memberdef.name: norm_inf

briefdescription.para: Compute the infinity norm for a Field.

parameterdescription.para: The space on which the function is executed (CPU/GPU).
The function whose norm is calculated.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, VectorConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, VectorIndexSetType, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > function)
memberdef.name: norm_inf

param.type: VectorConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, VectorIndexSetType, typename ExecSpace::memory_space >

briefdescription.para: Compute the infinity norm for a VectorField.

parameterdescription.para: The space on which the function is executed (CPU/GPU).
The function whose norm is calculated.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, ConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > function, ConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > exact_function)
memberdef.name: error_norm_inf

briefdescription.para: Compute the infinity norm of the error between 2 Fields.

parameterdescription.para: The space on which the function is executed (CPU/GPU).
The calculated function.
The exact function with which the calculated function is compared.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, ConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > function, ExactFunc exact_function)
memberdef.name: error_norm_inf

briefdescription.para: Compute the infinity norm of the error between 2 Fields.

parameterdescription.para: The space on which the function is executed (CPU/GPU).
The calculated function.
The exact function with which the calculated function is compared.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, VectorConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, VectorIndexSetType, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > function, VectorConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, VectorIndexSetType, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > exact_function)
memberdef.name: error_norm_inf

param.type: VectorConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, VectorIndexSetType, typename ExecSpace::memory_space >
VectorConstField< ElementType, IdxRange, VectorIndexSetType, typename ExecSpace::memory_space >

briefdescription.para: Compute the infinity norm of the error between 2 VectorFields.

parameterdescription.para: The space on which the function is executed (CPU/GPU).
The calculated function.
The exact function with which the calculated function is compared.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, Quadrature< IdxRangeQuad, IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > quadrature, DField< IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > function)
memberdef.name: norm_L1

briefdescription.para: Compute L1 norm of a function with a given quadrature.

parameterdescription.para: The space on which the function is executed (CPU/GPU).
The quadrature used to compute the integral.
A Field to the value of the function on the quadrature grid.

simplesect.para: A double containing the L1 norm of the function.

memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, Quadrature< IdxRangeQuad, IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > quadrature, DField< IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > function, DField< IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > exact_function)
memberdef.name: error_norm_L1

briefdescription.para: Compute the L1 norm of the error between 2 Fields.

parameterdescription.para: The space on which the function is executed (CPU/GPU).
The quadrature used to compute the integral.
The calculated function.
The exact function with which the calculated function is compared.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, Quadrature< IdxRangeQuad, IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > quadrature, DField< IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > function)
memberdef.name: norm_L2

briefdescription.para: Compute L2 norm of a function with a given quadrature.

parameterdescription.para: The space on which the function is executed (CPU/GPU).
The quadrature used to compute the integral.
A Field to the value of the function on the quadrature grid.

simplesect.para: A double containing the L2 norm of the function.

memberdef.argsstring: (ExecSpace exec_space, Quadrature< IdxRangeQuad, IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > quadrature, DField< IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > function, DField< IdxRangeQuad, typename ExecSpace::memory_space > exact_function)
memberdef.name: error_norm_L2

briefdescription.para: Compute the L2 norm of the error between 2 Fields.

parameterdescription.para: The space on which the function is executed (CPU/GPU).
The quadrature used to compute the integral.
The calculated function.
The exact function with which the calculated function is compared.

simplesect.para: A double containing the value of the infinity norm.

detaileddescription.para: File Describing useful mathematical functions to compute Lnorms
